Document:
# Basic Precursor Objectives This guide will explain the basic objectives that every Job Network Implant can see.
## Get Drunk or High These objectives will task you with gaining a lot of a particular status effect. To complete the objective you should consume a lot of a reagent that causes this status effect. For example, if you are tasked to get very drunk you must consume a lot of alchohol in a short period of time.
## Moving Up You must complete at least five basic objectives before you can choose a Rogue Network to join. Joining a network will unlock more advanced objectives but you will continue to get basic objectives as well.
